MIME-Version: 1.0
From: Start Daily <microsoft.start@email2.microsoft.com>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Thu, 02 May 2024 07:05:10 -0700
Subject: Australian student protests show US campus divisions over Gaza war are going global
Message-ID: <66339d9a.170a0220.5bf3f.4e6aSMTPIN_ADDED_BROKEN@mx.google.com>
Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en-us"><head><meta charset="utf-8"><meta content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" name="viewport"><title>Start Daily</title></head><body bgcolor="#f0f0f0"><table align="center" bgcolor="#f0f0f0" border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" dir="left" style="font-family:Segoe UI,-apple-system,helvetica Neue,Helvetica,Lucida Grande,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif" width="100%">
        <tr><td><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" height="52" style="background-color:#fff;box-shadow:0 3px 0 transparent" width="600"><tr><td align="left" style="padding:0;min-width:150px;min-height:50px;vertical-align:middle"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAADLEXDAF3NPYXF2WVIQWO5HFOHOJNUU5OXYUBHEEBM6A5KROVZ4UUBSAKYCYCL4PMJTEO5FA3YWPRFMPG2LKESSLOM6RYNAIRD52BAWM65SAKBR2R4JD34E63W6EHEAFDDHUOPTLSFHK46JOC5D6EZVXU7PASRVKTKUL5FNSKLA4BNMQBQAXF&d=AIAACQLETGXNGE7ZETWEUBWMN7IKMWDIAHEYNIFQMLKKPCIJG6HS3LTU4SHFU7GYE6GTWKVCBU6R2UZF5KH3UUVOGZJE3BGOK3XXKE653B7FIM2WBANAF76JY47K54RBAN47SQZUWHZUQZSL4RZ565QD4FCU5BDLZYRH7JYP5SSARCU2MX5OMI4MVNGPOZI4XPFY2S6CAKQ4B34INY&" id="NewHeaderMicrosoftStartImg" style="border:none" target="_blank"><img alt="MSN" height="45" src="https://www.bing.com/th?id=OEP.34427CBFF3D4D1C8119FED16222B4DEE&pid=BEmail" style="border:none;text-align:center" width="150"></a></td></tr></table></td></tr>
        <tr><td style="padding:24px 0 24px 0" align="center"><table style="padding:0 3px 0 3px" cellspacing="0" width="600"><tr><td style="padding-right:35px"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAADXC7EKGXKUBQNWH44QQJCAME6HJLDOQHYARO46D2LR2NQJ6MPZP26TIR43EKG4MTNZI6Z4A7C254A34L2XSY63XA3D2I7WFTVQCX5SW2KL3U5H3VHSJLOHBFYZA7KPSTJXAAMZX75NYHB6IDFGD5FCFOIHJEGPRICHB4J4ZKR2A2RTGLXZJL&d=AIAAC2NP6CP2X6QBVRTHFAXQGAOIJL5YQUUBJAJDKUR3BONHCCJDJX3ZW6DQHQJNNFYG6U5E5TLXPGXWPU25N5J5MY6E55KLS3CHKLJPWNGNZYAWJ45YF5IEVZ6KQLW46QGI4KVT7FIFCXRJXP5LFTXYPLWXMGRVAK4NCZGTDEIVQ7R3BUUTNVJX&" id="StartHeaderLogo" style="border:none" target="_blank"><img alt="Logo" height="110" src="https://www.bing.com/th?id=OEP.4464C20B10A9835DC26D56A7CF42E3D7&pid=BEmail&w=230&h=110&dpr=1&c=8&rs=2" style="border:none;margin:0" width="230"></a></td><td><table style="border-collapse:collapse"><tr><td height="50"></td></tr><tr><td style="border-left:2px solid;border-left-color:#ffb980;vertical-align:bottom;padding-left:10px"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAADTLICFCZ6LF63SFIPTPDMWUHJT6C4U4XWCJ5PUEQ2GJKANPETLOXG2YQKOE5RJGECTGE3CTTOMTFYUYPUM62UGKXG7F6Q3RQZPCGWNUFDHAJD3VIRPCP4O52MRB7EVZ5OYSZEQZMJG4727QW6HPL6JDVT3U4JUAAWZLFTEJHTB7H4I37ZX6P&d=AIAACESGASL24KLYKLNFOPEFQWKA4BVWANVA3CGAMAKPBIWMRC3FN422XGHQSOORPGYAGPND4IF6XPC5EG4KECYWAY6I7UWRQFLPCPU5DEVZRSVAU5DQNMIJ7WMDUZFZY4BOU4SF2BXG35FPAJL4KCL7G2C6MRPX4OB7ZQG62EXLULIHAXNCQXAG&" id="StartHeaderDescription" style="border:none;text-align:center;text-decoration:none" target="_blank"><span style="color:#464646;font-size:15px;font-weight:400">Start Daily brings you trending news every weekday</span></a></td></tr></table></td></tr></table></td><td><img alt="" height="1" src="https://www.msn.com/newsletter/t/o?telemetrytoken=9e146be431b341948ed613323644aae9&market=en-us&topicid=d015f8a4-f187-4810-888d-afa2d49537cb" style="border:none" width="1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></td></tr>
